action_steps: Break down revenue by channel and compare against baseline; check campaign changes, tracking issues, and promo calendar; identify top negative contributors.
Check sessions vs orders and conversion rate; review landing pages and checkout health; verify traffic mix changes by channel.

action_title: Improve basket value via bundles & upsell
action_steps: Identify category mix shift; promote bundles/cross-sell; highlight high-AOV products; review discounts that may be lowering order value.
evidence_needed: AOV trend, category mix, discount intensity

action_steps: Inspect recent site/app changes; review checkout errors and page speed; analyze channel quality; run A/B test or rollback if needed.
evidence_needed: Conversion trend, sessions, channel mix, release log

action_steps: Identify categories with increased return rate; check shipping delays and product issues; update product info/quality checks; adjust policies if needed.
evidence_needed: Return rate trend + category breakdown + shipping days

action_steps: Check order volume spikes; review staffing/capacity; courier SLA; update cut-off times; proactively communicate delays to customers.
Compare CAC proxy by channel; reduce spend on high-CAC channels; shift to low-CAC channels; refresh creatives and targeting.
evidence_needed: Spend, orders by channel, channel CAC

action_steps: Confirm uplift drivers (channel/category); cautiously scale spend or promotions; monitor CAC and return rate; avoid over-discounting.
Validate operations capacity and inventory; adjust fulfillment resources; maintain service levels to avoid shipping/return issues.
